step_rationale: Macrophage-derived chemokine driving monocyte recruitment and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: MIP-1α (CCL3) is a macrophage-derived chemokine that recruits monocytes and leukocytes, amplifying plaque inflammation and post-MI complications.

references.title: Inflammatory biomarkers and risk of cardiovascular events in patients undergoing coronary angiography.
Obesity superimposed on aging magnifies inflammation and delays the resolving response after myocardial infarction.
references.journal: American journal of physiology. Heart and circulatory physiology
